legal.termsSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our service.
legal.termsAcceptanceBody: By accessing and using workMitra, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement.
legal.termsAccountBody: To use certain features of the platform, you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate information and keep it updated.
legal.termsGigsBody: workMitra connects clients with freelancers. We are not a party to any agreement between users and do not guarantee the quality of work.
legal.termsPaymentBody: Clients agree to pay for gigs as agreed with freelancers. workMitra may charge fees for facilitating these transactions.
legal.termsProhibitedBody: You agree not to engage in any activity that interferes with or disrupts the services or servers.
legal.termsConfidentialityBody1: All projects, tasks, and assignments posted on workMitra by recruiters and companies are considered confidential intellectual property. By accepting or working on any project, you automatically agree to a binding Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA).
legal.termsConfidentialityPoint1: Do not share, leak, distribute, or publicly disclose any project details, source code, designs, data, or business information with any third party.
legal.termsConfidentialityPoint2: Do not discuss project internals on social media, forums, public repositories (GitHub, etc.), or any external platform.
legal.termsConfidentialityPoint3: All project-related communication must remain exclusively within the workMitra platform.
legal.termsConfidentialityWarning: Violation of this confidentiality policy is a serious breach of trust. The recruiting company reserves the right to take strict legal action, including but not limited to permanent account suspension, blacklisting, and pursuing damages under applicable laws.
legal.termsIntegrityBody1: workMitra is designed to help students learn real-world skills through hands-on project work. The use of AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Gemini, etc.) or any automated code generators to complete project deliverables is strictly prohibited.
legal.termsIntegrityPoint1: All submitted work must be 100% original and self-written. You are expected to learn, research, and build your submissions independently.
legal.termsIntegrityPoint2: Every submission will be checked for plagiarism using advanced detection tools. If your work is found to contain more than 20% plagiarism, your submission will be automatically rejected.
legal.termsIntegrityPoint3: Repeated plagiarism offences will result in permanent account suspension and blacklisting from the platform.
legal.termsIntegrityWarning: workMitra exists to help you grow — not to copy-paste. Build real skills, submit honest work, and earn genuine opportunities. Plagiarism above 20% = Automatic Rejection.
legal.privacySubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data.
legal.privacyDataCollectBody: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or use our services.
legal.privacyDataUseBody: We use the information we collect to operate, maintain, and improve our services, as well as to communicate with you.
legal.privacySecurityBody: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access or disclosure.
legal.privacyVisibilityBody: Your public profile, including your name, skills, and portfolio, may be visible to other users on the platform.
legal.refundSubtitle: Our policies regarding refunds and cancellations.
legal.refundSubscriptionBody: Subscription fees are non-refundable. You may cancel your subscription at any time, but no refunds will be issued for partial months.
legal.refundCancellationBody: If a gig is cancelled by the client before work begins, a full refund may be issued. If cancelled after work begins, refunds are at the discretion of the freelancer.
legal.refundDisapprovalBody: In case of a dispute regarding the quality of work, workMitra may mediate, but we do not guarantee a refund.
legal.refundContactBody: If you have any questions about refunds, please contact us at
legal.refundContactResolution: We will aim to resolve your issue promptly.
landing.faq1Question: How does the AI Resume Matching work?
landing.faq1Answer: Our system uses the advanced Gemini 2.5 Flash API to parse student resume documents and grade them directly against the project specifications and required skills set by corporate clients. The grading includes an actionable percentage score and match rationale.
landing.faq2Question: How do payouts work for completed gigs?
landing.faq2Answer: When a recruiter deploys a gig, the budget is safely registered. Once the student submits their solution, the recruiter reviews the submission, gives a star rating, writes a performance review, and marks it Completed, which immediately triggers the payment release.
landing.faq3Question: Is there support accessible via the website?
landing.faq3Answer: Yes! You can visit our Help Center and submit an online ticket, or directly mail our corporate support desk at supportworkmitra@gmail.com for assistance under 24 hours.
landing.heroDescription: Stop getting stuck in "Launching Soon" placeholders. workMitra is a fully functional web environment connecting college developers and startups with AI candidate grading, interactive stepper tracking, and rating systems.
landing.dualEngineTitle: A Dual Engine Built For Efficiency
landing.studentCardDescription: Build credential records, match skill matrices, and get paid.
landing.studentStep1: Onboard with college enrollment and list technical profile preferences.
landing.studentStep2: Upload PDF resume details for instant AI matching and matching score grade metrics.
landing.studentStep3: Submit solution link resources and track approval using active stepper progress charts.
landing.recruiterCardDescription: Deploy gig requirements, review applicants, and ensure safety.
landing.recruiterStep1: Deploy technical gig specifications with budgets, timelines, and skills filters.
landing.recruiterStep2: Review candidates ranked by matching grades, check rationale insights, and chat instantly.
landing.recruiterStep3: Verify solution links, input developer rating review scores, and trigger payouts safely.
landing.footerDescription: Connecting verified college developer networks with modern startups and projects.
landing.footerCopyright: Built for quality, verification, and transparency.

about.toastTicketCreated: Support ticket created! We will mail you shortly.
about.missionBody: workMitra was founded to solve the structural "Empty Shell" platform disconnect in the freelance marketplace. We bridge verified college student creators and modern startups through automated AI matching tools, secure progress trackers, and direct communication logs.
about.studentsBody: Students upload their CV documents, receive instant AI critique audits, browse active corporate projects, apply to gigs, and track task verification steps transparently. Approved tasks build public ratings, creating a verified portfolio of real-world freelance success.
about.corporateBody: Companies post gigs, review candidate profiles instantly backed by AI match score evaluations, chat in real-time, approve solution submissions, and write developer ratings—all from a single, streamlined web console.
about.contactDescription: Have questions about billing, account security, or gig deployments? Message us directly.
about.queryPlaceholder: Detail your question regarding billing, task statuses, or profile configs...
about.operatingHours: Operating Hours: Mon - Fri, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM IST
